subject: Accounting
title: Bookkeeping for Freelancers
description: Learn Bookkeeping for Freelancers in one minute.

hook.text: A freelance designer earns $80,000 a year. Without bookkeeping, tax time is a nightmare.

buildup.text: Freelancers must track income, expenses, estimated tax payments, and self-employment tax.

discovery.text: Separating business and personal accounts is the single most important step for any freelancer.

twist.text: Many freelancers skip bookkeeping until April—then scramble to reconstruct a year of transactions.

climax.text: Fifteen minutes of bookkeeping each week saves hours of stress and missed deductions at tax time.

quiz.question: What is the most important bookkeeping step for freelancers?
